# SpeakEasily

> Learn English via WhatsApp with AI-powered personalized lessons.

SpeakEasily is an AI-based English learning platform that delivers short, daily lessons through WhatsApp. No app downloads required — just chat and learn.

## Key Features
- Personalized AI lessons adapted to your level
- Audio practice with listening and shadowing exercises
- Real-time grammar and pronunciation correction
- Smart spaced repetition review system
- 5-minute daily micro-lessons
- Available in Spanish, Portuguese, and English

## Plans
- Monthly: €7.99/month
- Quarterly: €19.99/3 months
- Biannual: €34.99/6 months
